response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of professional development across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, making him severely overqualified for a junior/mid-level role. While his TypeScript, Node.js, and web architecture skills technically satisfy the stack requirements, and he has relevant AWS and Kubernetes exposure, the seniority mismatch is the dominant issue — retention risk and salary expectations would almost certainly misalign with an entry-level position. Additionally, PostgreSQL is not explicitly referenced (his relational DB work surfaces as MySQL/SQL alongside MongoDB), and Nest.js is entirely absent from his history.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise validated across multiple production environments including Tencent, RIDE Capital, and Naver
LLM/AI-agent integration experience at Naver (MCP code generators, agentic workflow infrastructure) directly matches the nice-to-have criterion
Kubernetes and AWS CDK exposure align with the cloud infrastructure nice-to-haves
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff and Senior-level titles spanning 15+ years make junior/mid-level role fit implausible from both compensation and engagement perspectives
PostgreSQL not mentioned; relational DB experience appears limited to MySQL/SQL, with MongoDB as the primary documented DB
No Nest.js experience present in any role, project, or skills section, despite it being a core framework listed in requirements
